title: Southside Bancshares, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Southside Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: SBSI) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per common share, payable on March 5, 2026, to shareholders of record on February 19, 2026. The Tyler, Texas-based bank holding company manages approximately $8.51 billion in assets and operates 53 branches across Texas.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of a regular quarterly cash dividend demonstrates financial stability and management confidence in the company's ability to generate consistent returns to shareholders. Dividend payments are typically viewed positively as they indicate profitability and shareholder-friendly capital allocation.

title: Southside Bancshares, Inc. Announces Third Quarter Earnings Call
author: Southside Bancshares, Inc.
description: Southside Bancshares will release its third quarter 2025 financial results on October 24, hosting a conference call with its executive leadership to discuss performance and answer analyst questions.

title: Southside Bancshares, Inc. to Ring NYSE Opening Bell to Celebrate 65th Anniversary
author: Lee R. Gibson
description: Southside Bancshares will ring the NYSE opening bell on July 28th to commemorate its 65-year history, highlighting its commitment to Texas communities and financial services.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is celebrating a significant milestone, highlighting long-term success, community commitment, and financial growth with $8.34 billion in assets
